title: tephroseris changii
intro: Tephroseris changii, also known as Chang's mountain saw-wort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Tephroseris changii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote health and well-being.
